xISO week directive '%V' must be used with the ISO year directive '%G' and a weekday directive '%A', '%a', '%w', or '%u'.z
1999 50z
%Y %V)
xISO year directive '%G' must be used with the ISO week directive '%V' and a weekday directive '%A', '%a', '%w', or '%u'.z
1999 51z

1999 Mondayz

1999 Monz

z`Day of the year directive '%j' is not compatible with ISO year directive '%G'. Use '%Y' instead.z
1999 51 6 256z
